message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant "User" as User
participant "API Gateway" as APIGateway
participant "Auth-Service" as AuthService
participant "User-Service" as UserService

User ->> APIGateway: POST /api/users
APIGateway -> AuthService: check authorization
AuthService -> APIGateway: http_status: 200
APIGateway -> AuthService: POST /api/users
AuthService -> UserService: http_status: 200
APIGateway -> User: profile created..

@enduml
